Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the application set tested upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: applicationFilter
Argument.Description: Optional Sailpoint filter selecting the endpoints to test. Default: all automatic endpoints

Argument.name: testSuite
Argument.type: choice:1=List,2=Test Connection,3=Iterate Groups,4=Iterate Accounts,5=Regular Aggregation,6=Random Read,7=Attribute Provisioning,8=Entitlement Provisioning,9=Account Enabling/Disabling,10=Account Creation/Deletion,11=Full Account Provisioning Lifecycle
Argument.Description: Choose the operation to invoke for the endpoint

Argument.name: identitySelector
Argument.Description: Identity to be used for tests. Default: random

Argument.name: attributeSelector
Argument.Description: Comma separated list of initial attribute assignments and attributes to select from the application schema for provisioning tests. For entitlement provisioning, on no match all entitlement attributes are used.

Argument.name: retries
Argument.Description: Number of provisioning retries (Default: 0). The retry interval is 10 seconds.

Argument.name: waitTime
Argument.Description: Number of seconds to wait after provisioning before checking the result (Default: 0)

Argument.name: numIterations
Argument.Description: Number of tests per application (Default: 1) or maximum number of accounts/groups to iterate (Default: infinity)

Argument.name: toggleSimulation
Argument.Description: Temporarily turn off SimulateProvisioning if needed

Argument.name: emulateRead
Argument.Description: Emulate the getObject() operation using iterate()

Argument.name: runInBackground
Argument.Description: Enable for long-running tests to get the result sent by email
